name: Milind Patel
title: Web Development Manager
summary: Web Development Manager and full-stack engineer with 10+ years of experience (since 2015) delivering scalable, secure web applications and leading cross-functional engineering teams. Deep expertise across the .NET ecosystem, modern JavaScript frameworks (Angular, React), cloud platforms (Azure and AWS), and Microsoft SQL Server — paired with a strong track record in Agile delivery, CI/CD, and mentoring high-performing teams. A strong advocate for AI-assisted development and Claude prompt engineering, building practical LLM workflows that accelerate delivery and elevate engineering quality.

experience.title: Web Development Manager
bullets: Directly lead and manage a team of developers — assigning and prioritizing work, conducting code reviews, mentoring, and owning their technical growth and delivery.
Leverage AI-assisted development and Claude prompt engineering to accelerate delivery, automate repetitive tasks, and improve code quality across the team.
Maintain and enhance a security-confidential Azure cloud environment within a highly collaborative operations team, introducing best practices for remediation.
Set up and configure Microsoft Azure and AWS cloud computing platform components.
Create code drops and patches for deployment across pre-production and production environments within secure systems.
Coordinate with external teams and stakeholders to assess the impact of changes and complete release work.
Perform code-merge activities across multiple ASP.NET C# applications.
Analyze functional requirements and deliver design solutions using the latest .NET framework with MS SQL Server.

experience.title: Lead Developer
bullets: Streamlined the implementation of a security-confidential Azure cloud environment within a highly collaborative operations team, introducing best practices for remediation.
Set up and configured Microsoft Azure and AWS cloud computing platform components.
Created code drops and patches for deployment across pre-production and production environments within secure systems.
Coordinated with external teams and stakeholders to assess the impact of changes and complete release work.
Performed code-merge activities across multiple ASP.NET C# applications.
Supported developers with troubleshooting and technical issues, and led project risk and issue identification and management.
Analyzed functional requirements and delivered design solutions using the latest .NET framework with MS SQL Server.

experience.title: .NET Developer
bullets: Worked within an Agile team across all phases of the software development lifecycle, delivering solutions to complex business problems.
Designed automation processes and SQL jobs to generate data based on RabbitMQ integration.
Designed and developed web applications using Angular 11 and .NET 5.
Updated Telerik Kendo UI controls to accelerate development and focus on value-generating features.
Set up and configured Microsoft Azure cloud computing platform components.
Designed stored procedures with SQL triggers to implement system-wide audit logging.

experience.title: Software Engineer
bullets: Collaborated with Product Owners and Scrum Masters to translate user stories into process flows built with the AWD BPM tool.
Designed automation processes for data filtering using XML logic and Mobius Document Direct.
Built robust user interfaces for custom applications on a modern .NET backend.
Created multiple parameterized stored procedures to power reporting and data retrieval.
Developed SSIS packages and DTS import/export routines to transfer data from SQL Server to client-side destinations.
Built reusable SSIS packages to extract data from flat files, Excel, and XML sources into SQL Server.

experience.title: Software Developer
bullets: Partnered with business analysts to capture data requirements through process blueprints and Visio diagrams.
Analyzed and designed business process automation using the IBM BPM 8.5 tool.
Built world-class web application interfaces using Angular and an ASP.NET Core backend.
Developed Business Process Definitions (BPDs) from business requirements and deployed them to test environments.
Tested and validated BPDs with positive and negative test cases, comparing expected and actual results through manual and automated testing.

experience.title: Senior Software Developer
bullets: Contributed as a core team member across design, coding, testing, and debugging operations.
Served in a client-facing role, translating business requirements into scalable, viable solutions.
Developed School ERP software that streamlined resource planning and reduced back-office workload through process automation.
Supported scope definition, planning, estimation, and tracking for API and application development.
Trained and mentored junior team members, leading the team to maximize business value and achieve IT goals.
